response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC requiring ~15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. Resume shows ~13-14 years of professional experience post-2012, no advanced degree, no evidence of AI products built or platform-scale AI work, no strategic advisory or principal-level leadership scope, and only minimal recent AI involvement. Title and seniority gap is significant.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the scale this Director-level role requires
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director — lacks strategic advisory and executive influence experience
No advanced degree and limited cloud-platform strategy depth; experience falls short of 15 years with required AI focus

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling exposure
